title: Huawei Band 11 up to 14 days of battery life is now available in Nepal
summary: Alongside the more premium Huawei Band 11 Pro , the regular Huawei Band 11 is now available in Nepal as well. It builds on the previous generation with a slightly larger screen and more health tracking features. In this article, I will discuss everything you need to know about the new Huawei Band 11, including its official price in Nepal, specifications, and availability. Advertisement Huawei Band
content:
Alongside the more premium Huawei Band 11 Pro , the regular Huawei Band 11 is now available in Nepal as well. It builds on the previous generation with a slightly larger screen and more health tracking features. In this article, I will discuss everything you need to know about the new Huawei Band 11, including its official price in Nepal, specifications, and availability. Advertisement Huawei Band 11 Overview Design and Display The Huawei Band 11 measures 42.6 × 28.2 × 8.99 mm and weighs around 17 grams for the aluminium model and 16 grams for the polymer version. There are CNC-cut aluminium variants in Beige, Green, White, and Black. Similarly, the polymer version comes in Purple and Black finishes, but the strap sizes vary slightly depending on the color option. Moreover, it also has 5 ATM water resistance. On the front, it features a 1.62-inch AMOLED display, which is 27% larger compared to Huawei Band 10 ( review ). The screen has gotten a lot sharper with a 347 PPI pixel density, while the Huawei Band 11 now has a smooth 60Hz refresh rate and an impressive 1,500 nits of peak brightness as well. Health and Wellness Tracking In terms of health and fitness tracking, it includes a 9-axis IMU sensor system with accelerometer, gyroscope, and magnetometer. There’s also an optical heart rate sensor and an ambient light sensor onboard. Moreover, the band supports 24-hour heart rate tracking, continuous SpO₂ monitoring, and HRV (Heart Rate Variability) tracking, including sleep HRV. Other features are pretty typical for fitness bands. You get sleep tracking, mood tracking with 12 emotional states, breathing exercises, and stress tracking as well. You can also share health data with family members through the Huawei Health app. Fitness and Smart Features Like almost every other fitness band, the Huawei Band 11 also supports around 100 workout modes, including yoga, strength training, and rope skipping. It also includes Active Rings tracking and activity streak goals. There’s wheelchair activity mode support as well. For normal use, you get call and message notifications, quick replies, remote camera shutter, calendar reminders, and built-in tools like a calculator, compass, and weather. The band supports over 100 watch faces along with custom widgets and Always On faces. Also, read: Connectivity and Battery The Band 11 supports Bluetooth 6.0 with BLE. It works with smartphones running Android 9 or later and iOS 13 or later through the Huawei Health app. On the battery side, Huawei says you can expect it to last up to 8 days under typical usage. Or up to 14 days by limiting some of its features, like sleep tracking. Huawei Band 11 Specifications Design, build: Aluminium or polymer case, 42.6 × 28.2 × 8.99 mm, 16 – 17 gm weight, 5 ATM water resistance Display: 1.62-inch AMOLED, 286 × 482 resolution, 347 PPI, up to 1,500 nits, 60Hz, Always On Display Software & UI: HarmonyOS 6.0, Huawei Health app integration Connectivity: Bluetooth 6.0, BLE Sensors: 9-axis IMU, optical heart rate sensor, ambient light sensor Battery: Up to 14 days under light use Huawei Band 11 Price in Nepal and Availability The official price of the Huawei Band 11 in Nepal is NPR 9,990 for the polymer case variant, whereas the one with an aluminum alloy case costs NPR 11,990. You can buy Huawei Band 11 in Nepal from different authorized stores across the country. Fitness band Price in Nepal (Official) Huawei Band 11 (Polymer) NPR 9,990 Huawei Band 11 (Aluminum Alloy) NPR 11,990 Buy Huawei Band 11 here VIDEO

Alongside the more premium Huawei Band 11 Pro , the regular Huawei Band 11 is now available in Nepal as well. It builds on the previous generation with a slightly larger screen and more health tracking features. In this article, I will discuss everything you need to know about the new Huawei Band 11, including its official price in Nepal, specifications, and availability.

The Huawei Band 11 measures 42.6 × 28.2 × 8.99 mm and weighs around 17 grams for the aluminium model and 16 grams for the polymer version. There are CNC-cut aluminium variants in Beige, Green, White, and Black. Similarly, the polymer version comes in Purple and Black finishes, but the strap sizes vary slightly depending on the color option. Moreover, it also has 5 ATM water resistance.

On the front, it features a 1.62-inch AMOLED display, which is 27% larger compared to Huawei Band 10 ( review ). The screen has gotten a lot sharper with a 347 PPI pixel density, while the Huawei Band 11 now has a smooth 60Hz refresh rate and an impressive 1,500 nits of peak brightness as well.

In terms of health and fitness tracking, it includes a 9-axis IMU sensor system with accelerometer, gyroscope, and magnetometer. There’s also an optical heart rate sensor and an ambient light sensor onboard. Moreover, the band supports 24-hour heart rate tracking, continuous SpO₂ monitoring, and HRV (Heart Rate Variability) tracking, including sleep HRV.

Other features are pretty typical for fitness bands. You get sleep tracking, mood tracking with 12 emotional states, breathing exercises, and stress tracking as well. You can also share health data with family members through the Huawei Health app.

Like almost every other fitness band, the Huawei Band 11 also supports around 100 workout modes, including yoga, strength training, and rope skipping. It also includes Active Rings tracking and activity streak goals. There’s wheelchair activity mode support as well.

For normal use, you get call and message notifications, quick replies, remote camera shutter, calendar reminders, and built-in tools like a calculator, compass, and weather. The band supports over 100 watch faces along with custom widgets and Always On faces.

Also, read:

The Band 11 supports Bluetooth 6.0 with BLE. It works with smartphones running Android 9 or later and iOS 13 or later through the Huawei Health app. On the battery side, Huawei says you can expect it to last up to 8 days under typical usage. Or up to 14 days by limiting some of its features, like sleep tracking.

The official price of the Huawei Band 11 in Nepal is NPR 9,990 for the polymer case variant, whereas the one with an aluminum alloy case costs NPR 11,990. You can buy Huawei Band 11 in Nepal from different authorized stores across the country.
